27 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/SurfaceUtils/ContactGroupImpl.h"
28 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/SurfaceUtils/IContactVariable.h"
29 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/SurfaceUtils/ContactGroup.h"

33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 
35 ContactFamily::
36 ContactFamily(Arcane::ITraceMng * traceMng, Arcane::IItemFamily * family1, Arcane::IItemFamily * family2)
37  : TraceAccessor(traceMng)
38  , m_shared_info(family1,family2)
39  , m_synchronizer(nullptr)
40  , m_name(Arcane::String::format("Contact{0}{1}",m_shared_info.m_family1->name(),m_shared_info.m_family2->name()))
41 {
42  m_groups["AllContacts"] = new ContactGroupImpl(this,m_local_ids,"AllContacts",true);
43  m_synchronizer = new ContactFamilyVariableSynchronizer(family1->parallelMng(),allContacts());
44 
45 }
46 
47 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
48 
49 ContactFamily::
50 ~ContactFamily()
51 {
52  debug() << "Destroying family " << this;
53  while(not m_variables.empty()) {
54  std::set< IContactVariable* >::iterator i = m_variables.begin();
55  (*i)->detachFromFamily();
56  }
57 
58  for(std::map<String,ContactGroupImpl*>::iterator i = m_groups.begin();
59  i != m_groups.end(); ++i)
60  {
61  delete i->second;
62  }
63  delete m_synchronizer;
64 }
65 
66 void ContactFamily::updateInternalList()
67 {
68  m_shared_info.update() ;
69 }
70 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
71 
72 ContactGroup
73 ContactFamily::
74 allContacts()
75 {
76  std::map<String,ContactGroupImpl*>::iterator finder = m_groups.find("AllContacts");
77  ARCANE_ASSERT((finder != m_groups.end()),("Missing AllContacts internal group"));
78  return finder->second;
79 }
80 
81 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
82 
83 ContactInternal *
84 ContactFamily::
85 contactsInternal()
86 {
87  return m_internals.unguardedBasePointer();
88 }
89 
90 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
91 
92 const ContactInternal *
93 ContactFamily::
94 contactsInternal() const
95 {
96  return m_internals.unguardedBasePointer();
97 }
98 
99 
100 
101 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
102 
103 void
104 ContactFamily::
105 registerVariable(IContactVariable* var)
106 {
107  /* const bool insertion = */ m_variables.insert(var);
108  debug() << "ContactFamily " << this << " register Variable " << var;
109 }
110 
111 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
112 
113 void
114 ContactFamily::
115 unregisterVariable(IContactVariable* var)
116 {
117  std::set<IContactVariable*>::iterator finder = m_variables.find(var);
118  if (finder == m_variables.end())
119  {
120  fatal() << "Cannot unregister a variable never registered";
121  }
122  else
123  {
124  debug() << "ContactFamily " << this << " unregister Variable " << var;
125  m_variables.erase(finder);
126  }
127 }
128 
129 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
130 
131 Int32
132 ContactFamily::
133 addContact(const Int32 lid1, const Int32 lid2)
134 {
135  if (not m_variables.empty())
136  fatal() << "Management of addContact with existing variables not implemented";
137  const Int32 lid = m_internals.size();
138  m_internals.add(ContactInternal());
139  ContactInternal & internal = m_internals[lid];
140  m_local_ids.add(lid);
141  internal.m_local_id = lid;
142  internal.m_lid1 = lid1;
143  internal.m_lid2 = lid2;
144  internal.m_shared_info = &m_shared_info;
145  return lid;
146 }
147 
148 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
149 
150 ContactGroup
151 ContactFamily::
152 createGroup(const String & name)
153 {
154  ContactGroup group = findGroup(name);
155  if (!group.null()) {
156  fatal() << "Cannot create existing ContactGroup '" << name << "'";
157  }
158  ContactGroupImpl * new_group = new ContactGroupImpl(this,Arcane::Int32SharedArray(),name,false);
159  m_groups[name] = new_group;
160  debug(Arcane::Trace::Medium) << "Create new contact group '" << name << "' with impl " << new_group;
161  return new_group;
162 }
163 
164 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
165 
166 ContactGroup
167 ContactFamily::
168 findGroup(const String & name)
169 {
170  std::map<String,ContactGroupImpl*>::iterator finder = m_groups.find(name);
171  if (finder == m_groups.end())
172  return ContactGroup();
173  else
174  return finder->second;
175 }
176

178 
179 void
180 ContactFamily::
181 notifyGroupChange(ContactGroupImpl * group)
182 {
183  // Avertir les variables partiels utilisant ce groupe
184 }

186 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
187 
188 void
189 ContactFamily::
190 computeSynchronizeInfos()
191 {
192  if (m_synchronizer->parallelMng()->isParallel())
193  {
194  m_synchronizer->compute();
195  }
196  m_is_synchronized = true;
197 }
198 
199 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
200 
201 Arcane::IVariableSynchronizer*
202 ContactFamily::
203 allItemsSynchronizer()
204 {
205  if (!m_is_synchronized)
206  m_synchronizer->parallelMng()->traceMng()->fatal() <<
207  Arcane::String::format("In contact family ({0}) ContactFamily::computeSynchronizeInfos() must be called before call to ContactFamily::allItemsSynchronizer()",
208  m_name);
209  return m_synchronizer;
210 
211 }
212 
213 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

215 void
216 ContactFamily::
217 endUpdate()
218 {
219 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
220 //#ifndef WIN32
221 //#warning "TODO: or CHECK"
222 //#endif
223 //#endif /* NO_USER_WARNING */
224  m_is_synchronized = false;
225 }

229 ContactSharedInfo*
230 ContactFamily::sharedInfo() {
231  return &m_shared_info;
232 }

234 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
235 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
236 
237 FaceFaceContactFamily::
238 FaceFaceContactFamily(Arcane::ITraceMng * traceMng, Arcane::IItemFamily * family)
239  : ContactFamily(traceMng,family,family)
240  , m_face_group_need_update(true)
241 {
242  if (family->itemKind() != Arcane::IK_Face)
243  throw Arcane::ArgumentException(A_FUNCINFO,"FaceFaceContactFamily requires a family of face");
244 }
245 
246 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
247 
248 NodeFaceContactFamily::
249 NodeFaceContactFamily(Arcane::ITraceMng * traceMng, Arcane::IItemFamily * node_family, Arcane::IItemFamily * face_family)
250  : ContactFamily(traceMng,node_family,face_family)
251 {
252  if (node_family->itemKind() != Arcane::IK_Node or face_family->itemKind() != Arcane::IK_Face)
253  throw Arcane::ArgumentException(A_FUNCINFO,"NodeFaceContactFamily requires families of nodes and faces");
254 }
255 
256 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
257 
258 Arcane::FaceGroup
259 FaceFaceContactFamily::
260 allFaces()
261 {
262  if(m_face_group_need_update)
263  {
264 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
265 //#ifndef WIN32
266 //#warning "BUG: remise ��� jour non effective si les contacts sont modifi���s"
267 //#endif
268 //#endif
269  _updateFaceGroup() ;
270  m_face_group_need_update = false ;
271  }
272  return m_face_group ;
273 }
274 
275 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
276 
277 
278 void
279 FaceFaceContactFamily::
280 _updateFaceGroup()
281 {
282 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
283 //#ifndef WIN32
284 //#warning "TODO: A optimiser en utilisant les techniques classiques Arcane"
285 //#warning "TODO: A calculer de mani���re incr���mental pour stabiliser le groupe si c'est un support"
286 //#endif
287 //#endif
288  std::set<Integer> mark ;
289  SharedArray<Integer> lids ;
290  ContactGroup contacts = allContacts() ;
291  lids.reserve(2*contacts.size()) ;
292  ENUMERATE_FACEFACECONTACT(icontact,contacts)
293  {
294  const ContactType& contact = *icontact ;
295  Integer face_local_id = contact.face1().localId() ;
296  if(face_local_id != Arcane::NULL_ITEM_LOCAL_ID && mark.find(face_local_id)==mark.end())
297  {
298  mark.insert(face_local_id) ;
299  lids.add(face_local_id) ;
300  }
301  face_local_id = contact.face2().localId() ;
302  if(face_local_id != Arcane::NULL_ITEM_LOCAL_ID && mark.find(face_local_id)==mark.end())
303  {
304  mark.insert(face_local_id) ;
305  lids.add(face_local_id) ;
306  }
307  }
308  m_face_group_name ="FaceFaceContactFaceGroup" ;
309  m_face_group = m_shared_info.m_family1->createGroup(m_face_group_name,lids,true) ;
310 }
311 
312 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
313 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
314 
315 void
316 ContactItemFamily::
317 _updateInternals()
318 {
319  m_uids.resize(m_contact_family->nbContact());
320  m_uids_view = m_uids.view();
321 #ifdef USE_ARCANE_V3
322 #if ARCANE_VERSION < 31307
323  ARCANE_FATAL("Not yet implemented with this Arcane version. Use at least Arcane 3.13.8");
324 #else
325  auto *associated_dof_family =
326  m_dof_mng.getFamily(m_associated_dof_family_name);
327  auto nb_dofs = associated_dof_family->nbItem();
328  auto nb_contacts = m_contact_family->nbContact();
329  Arcane::Int64UniqueArray new_contact_uids(Arcane::math::max(nb_contacts-nb_dofs,0));
330  Arcane::Int32UniqueArray new_contact_lids(Arcane::math::max(nb_contacts-nb_dofs,0));
331  auto index = 0;
332  for (auto contact_index = nb_dofs; contact_index < nb_contacts ; ++contact_index) {
333  auto contact_internal = m_contact_family->contactsInternal()[contact_index];
334  new_contact_lids[index] = contact_internal.localId();
335  new_contact_uids[index] = _uniqueId(contact_internal);
336  index++;
337  }
338  auto nb_new_contacts = new_contact_uids.size();
339  Arcane::Int32UniqueArray dof_lids(new_contact_uids.size());
340  associated_dof_family->addDoFs(new_contact_uids,dof_lids);
341  // the only thing needed : an array with the internals!
342  m_internals = associated_dof_family->itemFamily()->itemsInternal();
343  // Change the internals lids to make them match with contact ones. Attention it changes dof lids...
344  for (auto index = 0; index < nb_new_contacts; ++index) {
345  m_internals[dof_lids[index]]->setLocalId(new_contact_lids[index]);
346  }
347 #endif // ARCANE VERSION
348 #else
349  m_shared_info.m_unique_ids = &m_uids_view;
350  for (Arcane::Integer contact_index = m_internals.size(); contact_index < m_contact_family->nbContact(); ++contact_index) {
351  Arcane::ItemInternal *internal = new Arcane::ItemInternal();
352  ContactInternal contact =
353  m_contact_family->contactsInternal()[contact_index];
354  internal->setSharedInfo(&m_shared_info);
355  internal->setLocalId(contact.localId());
356  internal->setUniqueId(_uniqueId(contact));
357  m_internals.add(internal);
358  }
359 #endif
360 }
361 
362 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
363 
364 template <typename Item1T, typename Item2T>
365 Arcane::Int64
366 _computeUniqueId(ContactInternal const& contact) {
367  auto null_uid = Arcane::NULL_ITEM_UNIQUE_ID;
368  Arcane::Int64 unique_id = null_uid;
369  if (contact.item1Internal()->uniqueId() != null_uid && contact.item2Internal()->uniqueId() != null_uid) {
370  unique_id = Arcane::DualUniqueIdMng::uniqueIdOf<Item1T,Item2T>(contact.item1Internal(),
371  contact.item2Internal());
372  }
373  else if (contact.item1Internal()->uniqueId() == null_uid && contact.item2Internal()->uniqueId() != null_uid) {
374  unique_id = Arcane::DualUniqueIdMng::uniqueIdOf<Item2T>(contact.item2Internal());
375  }
376  else if (contact.item1Internal()->uniqueId() != null_uid && contact.item2Internal()->uniqueId() == null_uid){
377  unique_id = Arcane::DualUniqueIdMng::uniqueIdOf<Item1T>(contact.item1Internal());
378  }
379  else unique_id = Arcane::NULL_ITEM_UNIQUE_ID;
380  return unique_id;
381 }
382 
383 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
384 
385 Arcane::Int64
386 ContactItemFamily::
387 _uniqueId(ContactInternal& contact)
388 {
389  auto unique_id = Arcane::NULL_ITEM_UNIQUE_ID;
390 
391  switch (contact.m_shared_info->m_kind) {
392  case IContactFamily::IK_FaceFace:
393  unique_id = _computeUniqueId<Arcane::Face, Arcane::Face>(contact);
394  break;
395  case IContactFamily::IK_NodeFace:
396  unique_id = _computeUniqueId<Arcane::Node, Arcane::Face>(contact);
397  break;
398  }
399  if (unique_id == Arcane::NULL_ITEM_UNIQUE_ID)
400  traceMng()->fatal()
401  << Arcane::String::format("Cannot create a uid for a null contact (with local id {1}). Both contact items have null uid. In family {0}.",
402  name(),contact.localId());
403  return unique_id;
404 }
405 
406 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
407 
408 void
409 ContactItemFamily::
410 itemsUniqueIdToLocalId(Int32ArrayView local_ids,Int64ConstArrayView unique_ids,bool do_fatal) const
411 {
412  ARCANE_ASSERT(local_ids.size() == unique_ids.size(),("Lids and Uids array sizes must be equal."))
413  ARCANE_ASSERT(unique_ids.size() <= m_uids.size(), ("Contact uids have not been generated.")) // contact uids are generated calling view() methods. If you come up with
414  // uids, it means you have already generated them...Assertion should always be ok
415  Arcane::Integer index, i = 0;
416  for (auto uid : unique_ids)
417  {
418  index = ArcGeoSim::ArrayScan::exhaustiveScan(uid,m_uids.constView());
419  if (index == -1)
420  {
421  local_ids[i++] = Arcane::NULL_ITEM_LOCAL_ID;
422  if (do_fatal) throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(Arcane::String::format("No contact with unique id {0}",uid));
423  }
424  else
425  {
426  local_ids[i++] = m_contact_family->contactsInternal()[index].localId();
427  }
428  }
429 }
430 
431
